title: Disable the ability to write item updates in a board
excerpt: Hi! Is there a way to disable pulses update in a selected board but allow all other actions?

posts.author: edoaber (Edoardo Bernasconi)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi! Is there a way to disable pulses update in a selected board but allow all other actions?

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
@edoaber,

Currently, no.

If it is important to your use case, you could use something like an Integromat integration to delete any updates (or delete updates by specific users, etc.)

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
